graphlib/TopologicalSorter/get_ready.name: get_ready
graphlib/TopologicalSorter/get_ready.description: Returns a tuple with all the nodes that are ready. Initially it returns all nodes with no predecessors, and once those are marked as processed by calling TopologicalSorter.done(), further calls will return all new nodes that have all their predecessors already processed. Once no more progress can be made, empty tuples are returned. Raises ValueError if called without calling prepare() previously.
